calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Visio #12353.

Joseph Sacramento, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Cirilo Ramirez.
Plaintiff's Witness Cirilo Ramirez was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Victor Ramirez, Richard Martinez and Paul Derenzo.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1421 Ingalis St., San Francisco, CA. 94124
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Past-due Rent - $3400.00
Holdover damages - $7626.08
Costs - $577.85 for a Total of $11,603.93
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Cirilo Ramirez is present.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Richard Martinez IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of AUG-27-2012 remains on calendar.
